examples: Fossil bones of the huge herbivorous dinosaurs known as sauropods were first discovered and studied between 1840 and 1880, providing evidence for the gargantuan dimensions of the adults.
Convertibility of the currency is a gargantuan barrier.
You get to eat gargantuan amounts of food after marathons.
The company's gargantuan volume allows it to keep costs below many of its competitors.
If Texans were Muslim, this would be the sort of gargantuan building they would attempt.
